textByHash.b21f8be3cd344616e536b58fbb8ca8271e0e1abd: Welcome to the Mining Guild. My name's Gadrin and I'm the Guildmaster. Can I help you with anything?
textByHash.ca19260d0a5fe6f5ef63951649037ce627d1f6e2: All sorts of things! There's plenty of coal rocks along with some iron, mithril and adamantite as well.
textByHash.bed76b88e9b2c0f127814e83c084fbc520a0ad6d: Deeper in the guild you'll find even more rocks including some runite! The best bit though is our amethyst mine, the only one in the land!
textByHash.22b70553f99b6c8b524601bdc2e206a88076a938: There's no better mining site anywhere!
textByHash.aeafbf903e26a36ca6301397b7eb2f625d5f971c: What do you think? We smelt it into bars, smith the metal to make armour and weapons, then we exchange them for goods and services.
textByHash.92155f4c590aef039c5d27c07ff94c975e74792b: No, this is only a mining outpost. We dwarves don't much like to settle in human cities. Most of the ore is carted off to Keldagrim, the great dwarven city. They've got a special blast furnace up there - it makes
textByHash.12e0a67c6e8a1a008547abfdd60d80545df9e3f5: smelting the ore so much easier. There are plenty of dwarven traders working in Keldagrim. Anyway, can I help you with anything else?
textByHash.db578e9a809de25266fa16d1f09e4cc59e086c9d: Sure, this is a Skillcape of Mining. It shows my stature as a master miner! It has all sorts of uses including a skill boost to my Mining skill and a chance of mining extra ores. When you get to level 99 come and talk to
textByHash.eced0da9b35642b91260fef8df07d8abbf86a58e: me and I'll sell you one.
textByHash.dd241fadb13f9f3ccf23fb54523268ea556e18a5: Is there anything else I can help you with?
textByHash.3071cf090a68275e5c32844eec0785d955a8313c: You believe right, miner. You have earned the right to wear one and when you do you'll have a small chance of finding an extra ore, but I'll need 99000 coins from you first.
textByHash.d701039072aeedeacd1df2cfd09a5c7c09ada678: I'm sorry you feel that way; come back if you change your mind.
textByHash.51fa37d1170bc1f1df9b1be904847b619638c195: Well, come back and see me when you do.
textByHash.58f1fdd904d724b985799470ba396e43535885d8: Unfortunately all Skillcapes are only available with a free hood, it's part of a skill promotion deal; buy one get one free, you know. So you'll need to free up some inventory space before I can sell you one.
